doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers with subsections (a) through (d), whereas this document invents subsections about paralegal supervision and emergency exceptions that do not exist in the real r
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 focuses on multijurisdictional practice by lawyers and contains subsections (a) through (d) addressing temporary and permanent practice across jurisdictions; this document fabricates subsections (b) and (c) about paralegal supervision and "no emergency exception" that do not exist in the real rule, and the purported definition of "practice of law" in (a) is invented text not found in the actual rule.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers with subsections (a) through (d), whereas this document invents subsections about paralegal supervision and emergency exceptions that do not exist in the real rule.
